name: Sausage Cheese Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9x12 glass baking pan.
2. Spread the bread with butter and cut into 1/4-inch cubes, leaving on the crusts.
3. Cook sausage well and drain.
4. Layer the bread cubes in the pan.
5. Top with half the sausage, 1 cup of cheese.
6. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
7. Beat eggs until light and lemon-colored. Add milk, white wine, garlic powder, and mustard; stir together.
8. Pour over the pan.
9. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
10. Uncover and bake at 325°F for 1 hour or until lightly browned.
11. Top with remaining cheese and green onions.
12. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
